name: Records
description: Personal knowledge store — notes, decisions, research, bookmarks managed by AI agents
setupHint: No configuration needed — works out of the box.

setupGuide.title: Ready to use
setupGuide.description: Records stores data locally on your machine. No external account or API key needed. Your AI agents can create notes, decisions, research, and bookmarks. Delete and archive access are off by default — enable them explicitly if needed.

setupGuide.title: Optional: use a shared database
setupGuide.description: For team use, provide a PostgreSQL connection string in the Database URL field. Otherwise, leave it empty to use local SQLite storage.
